title: Sabaody’s Cruel World
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #7, Law, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #7, Law, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of sabaody’s cruel world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kidd and law were there, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: How's the coating of the ship going!?

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: We're launching for fishman Island immediately!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: We can't handle an Admiral coming down....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: His captain is an idiot, too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!! Right away, Captain Drake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There's something wrong with that entire family....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We believe they've all been taken out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There's no way that we can't respond.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll go. And I'll be right back.

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #7, Law, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of sabaody’s cruel world.
